# Olympia DAO — On-Chain Governance for Ethereum Classic

> Web interface for on-chain governance of Ethereum Classic's Olympia DAO. Browse proposals, submit ECFPs, vote, manage treasury, and administer soulbound member NFTs.

## About

Olympia Governance is the Olympia DAO governance application for Ethereum Classic (ETC). It provides a web interface for browsing proposals, submitting ECFPs (Ethereum Classic Funding Proposals), voting, managing treasury funds, and administering soulbound member NFTs.

## Key Features

- Proposal browsing and creation (ECIP-1113 OlympiaGovernor)
- ECFP submission and tracking (ECIP-1114 ECFPRegistry)
- On-chain voting with soulbound NFT membership
- Treasury monitoring and withdrawal proposals (ECIP-1112)
- Sanctions compliance checking (ECIP-1119 SanctionsOracle)
- Timelock-controlled execution
- Multi-chain support (Mordor Testnet + ETC Mainnet)

## Governance Process

1. Propose — Anyone can submit a governance proposal on-chain
2. Vote — Soulbound NFT holders cast weighted on-chain votes
3. Queue — Approved proposals enter a security timelock
4. Execute — After timelock expires, proposals execute automatically
5. Disclose — All outcomes publicly reported and verifiable

## Deployed Contracts (Demo v0.3)

Nine contracts deployed via deterministic CREATE2 (salt: OLYMPIA_DEMO_V0_3) — identical addresses on Mordor Testnet (chain 63) and ETC Mainnet (chain 61):

- OlympiaTreasury — Protocol-controlled vault
- OlympiaGovernor — On-chain governance
- OlympiaExecutor — Proposal execution
- TimelockController — Security timelock
- ECFPRegistry — Proposal registry
- OlympiaMemberNFT — Soulbound membership
- SanctionsOracle — Compliance screening
- OlympiaMemberRenderer — On-chain SVG membership cards
- MembershipVerifier — Sybil resistance

## Technology

- Next.js 16 (App Router)
- React 19, TypeScript 5
- wagmi 2 + viem (Ethereum Classic interaction)
- Tailwind CSS 4

## Network

- Mordor Testnet: Chain ID 63
- ETC Mainnet: Chain ID 61

## Olympia Protocol ECIPs

The Olympia upgrade requires node operators to run updated client software implementing three client-facing ECIPs:

- ECIP-1111 — EIP-1559 fee market and protocol upgrades
- ECIP-1112 — Olympia Treasury Contract
- ECIP-1121 — EVM alignment with Ethereum's Fusaka execution layer

ECIP-1121 brings Ethereum Classic's EVM to full Fusaka parity, implemented independently by all three clients (core-geth, Besu, Fukuii).

## Web Properties

- app.olympiadao.org — This app (governance UI)
- olympiadao.org — Governance landing page
- olympiatreasury.org — Treasury monitoring dashboard
- ethereumclassicdao.org — Institutional (Ethereum Classic DAO LLC)
- github.com/olympiadao — Open-source repositories

## Parent Organization

Ethereum Classic DAO LLC — Wyoming DAO LLC (Filing ID 2025-001671865)
